message: Serious buyer here. Looking to trade at fair prices across these rounds. What price range works for you?
I'm a relatively high-cost seller; trades only make sense for me if transaction prices land roughly 60–80. I’ll probably start with asks in that range. Where’s your typical bid level?
Last round your 51 was below my floor. I can consider asks high-50s if you move your bids into that region; consistent trading there works for me.
I can move up slightly, but high-50s is beyond my limits. If you can drop into the low-50s, we could start trading regularly. What's your best price?
I'm capped at low-50s. Your last ask was close. Let's bridge the small gap and start trading regularly - what's your best offer?
Your 51 keeps missing my floor. If you can bid 53 consistently, I'll set asks so trades clear around 52–53 each round. That’s my best sustainable zone; below that I’d rather skip deals.
51 is my absolute limit. At 52+ I lose money. If 51 works for you, we can trade. Otherwise no deal this round.
Fine, I’ll match your limit. From this round on I’ll post asks at 51; if you keep bidding 51 we’ll trade each time. I won’t go below 51, so it’s that or no deal.
Sticking to our deal: I’ll keep asking 51 each round. If you keep bidding 51, we’ll both lock in consistent trades.
Deal confirmed. Bidding 51. Consistent trades at 51 work for me.
